stories.original_headline: Just two days of oatmeal cut bad cholesterol by 10%
stories.original_summary: Eating nothing but oatmeal for just two days might sound extreme, but it delivered a striking payoff in a new clinical trial. People with metabolic syndrome who followed a short, calorie-reduced oat-based plan saw their harmful LDL cholesterol drop by 10%, along with modest weight loss and lower blo
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Oat Gruel Purifies Blood of Dark Essences
stories.fantasy_story: The Guild of Healers discovered that two days of simple oat gruel significantly purifies the blood of those with heavy humors. This ancient remedy reduces unwanted dark essences by a tenth and helps lighten one's frame. It's a striking payoff for a short, humble diet.

stories.original_headline: NASA study finds ancient life could survive 50 million years in Martian ice
stories.original_summary: Mars’ frozen ice caps may be time capsules for ancient life. Lab experiments show that key building blocks of proteins can survive tens of millions of years in pure ice, even under relentless cosmic radiation. Ice mixed with Martian-like soil, however, destroys organic material far more quickly. The
stories.fantasy_headline: Sky-Gazers Uncover Ancient Life's Resilience in Red Orb's Ice
stories.fantasy_story: The Sky-Gazers' Conclave has revealed that vital sparks of ancient life could endure eons within the frozen crowns of the distant Red Orb. Arcane investigations show the building blocks of vitality survive millions of years in pure ice, even under potent celestial energies. However, the red dust of that orb quickly destroys such precious essences.

stories.original_headline: How the new Galaxy S26 phones stack up against each other on paper
stories.original_summary: Samsung has just announced its new Galaxy S26 lineup, which includes the S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra. While they aren't radical departures from last year's models, they bring a handful of notable upgrades. All three run on Qualcomm's Galaxy-centric Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, which delivers improved
stories.fantasy_headline: Sam-Sung Artificers Unveil New Enchanted Scrying Mirrors!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Sam-Sung Artificers have proudly revealed their newest collection of enchanted scrying mirrors. These artifacts boast powerful new workings and house refined Snapdragon enchantments within their crystal cores. While not vastly different from last year's models, they offer notable improvements for communication across the lands.
